title: More Splash Text
description: Bored of the vanilla splash text? This mod has 200 new ones!
body:
### **Bored of the original splash text?**

Transform your Minecraft experience with a hilarious twist! This resource pack replaces all the default splash texts with a collection of over 200 brand-new, comical messages. From quirky quotes about creepers to tongue-in-cheek remarks about mining and mobs, every new splash text is guaranteed to make you chuckle as you start your game. Whether you're breaking blocks, avoiding lava, or crafting the perfect sword, this pack will keep you entertained with its witty and fun-filled messages.

Features:

Over 200 unique and funny splash texts!
Replaces all vanilla splash messages on the main menu.
Comical and light-hearted humor to keep you entertained every time you log in.
Ideal for Minecraft players looking to add more fun to their game.
Installation: Simply download the pack and place it in your "resource packs" folder. Then, activate it from the Minecraft menu to start enjoying the new splash texts right away!

Note: Compatible with Minecraft version 1.21.1 and above. No additional mods or dependencies are required.

Get ready for a good laugh each time you start your Minecraft adventure with this funny and creative splash text resource pack!



- Creepers are just misunderstood!
- I dig dirt for fun.
- My pickaxe is ready!
- Mine or be mined!
- I found diamonds...nevermind.
- Too cool for a wooden pickaxe.
- Never trust a skeleton.
- Don't feed the Enderman!
- I’m not lost, I’m exploring.
- Creeper? More like booper!
- Oops, I broke the world.
- Welcome to the block party!
- I’m just here for the cake.
- The lava is fine, trust me.
- Who needs sleep when you have blocks?
- Can you find the hidden chest? Probably not.
- Spiders have eight reasons to be creepy.
- I came, I saw, I mined.
- Block breaking is my cardio.
- Did someone say TNT?
- Build first, ask questions later.
- Creepers: the original sneak attack.
- Life’s a grind, then you mine.
- I don't run from zombies...much.
- I've got a pickaxe and I'm not afraid to use it!
- Pickaxes: the real MVP.
- Run, there's a spider!
- Block the haters!
- Need a bed? Just dig down.
- I break blocks, not hearts.
- A creeper exploded here... oops.
- Waking up in a dirt house... again.
- Welcome to the Overworld!
- Skeletons are just bad archers.
- I’m just here for the loot.
- Beware of the mysterious Enderman.
- Digging is my cardio!
- No one’s ever lost in Minecraft, right?
- Why dig when you can mine?
- Collecting blocks... one at a time.
- I swear I had a map.
- Let’s mine it 'til we find it!
- Zombies have better hair than me.
- Cobblestone is my true love.
- I’m just one block away from greatness.
- Always have a backup sword!
- Don't stand still, the mobs are watching.
- Blockhead, reporting for duty!
- Minecraft: where cows are friends.
- Where’s my diamond sword? I need it now.
- I’m not lost, I’m on an adventure!
- Build a house, then hide from mobs.
- Just one more block… just one more…
- Avoiding lava like a pro.
- Zombies are only good at one thing: chasing.
- Lava? I thought that was soup.
- I found a cave! I’m probably going to die.
- Watch out! A spider’s behind you.
- A pickaxe is your best friend.
- Mine first, ask questions later.
- Why build a mansion when you can have a cave?
- Spiders: nature’s trampoline.
- Just another day in the world of blocks!
- TNT is the answer to everything.
- All I want for Christmas is diamonds.
- Who needs a map when you have a compass?
- Minecraft: the only place where blocks have feelings.
- How do I build? With blocks, obviously.
- Cows are great… until they get stuck in doors.
- I thought I saw a creeper, but it was just a flower.
- Blocks are the new black.
- Watch out, it's a zombie apocalypse!
- Creepers are just misunderstood.
- Don’t dig straight down… unless you’re feeling adventurous.
- Minecraft: where the world is your canvas.
- I’m an expert at breaking things.
- Diamonds are forever... until you fall in lava.
- Just trying to make it through the night.
- Who needs a torch when you have a furnace?
- The world is flat… if you don’t dig deep enough.
- Who needs sleep when you can mine?
- The only thing that’s dangerous here is me.
- I didn’t build that hole, I swear!
- I don't need a map, I have instinct.
- If you hear a hiss, run!
- Never trust a bed in a cave.
- Lava baths are the best kind of spa.
- What do you mean, "I'm lost"? I know exactly where I am.
- All this mining is making me hungry.
- The only mob I fear? My own reflection.
- Mobs? I prefer to call them "pets."
- I am the king of my dirt castle!
- The real treasure is the blocks you break along the way.
- No need for a compass when I can just get lost.
- Skeletons: bad at aiming, good at standing still.
- Diamonds in the rough? I call them treasure.
- Zombie apocalypse? I call it Tuesday.
- It's not a cave, it’s a lifestyle.
- Bouncing on beds is fun, right?
- Creepers: because who needs friends?
- Look, another cave! Time to die again.
- Not today, creeper. Not today.
- My pickaxe has better moves than I do.
- I don’t need directions; I need blocks.
- My strategy? Just run and hope for the best.
- Mining all day, mining all night.
- I didn’t break that block… it broke me.
- Got to catch 'em all—cows, that is.
- The floor is lava… literally.
- Who needs armor when you have blocks?
- I don’t need to find diamonds; I’m just here for fun.
- Oh, look, more dirt. Yawn.
- I’m just waiting for the next explosion.
- Can’t stop, won’t stop mining.
- Mobs? More like free experience points.
- Never dig straight down. Unless you're me.
- Gotta go fast, there’s lava ahead!
- The best part of mining? The exploding surprises.
- Another day, another block to break.
- Oops, I accidentally made a hole in the world.
- I can’t hear you over the sound of my pickaxe.
- Blocks are friends, not food… unless it's wood.
- Lava’s hot, but so am I.
- Is this real life or just Minecraft?
- Who needs trees when you’ve got a pickaxe?
- Not a fan of skeletons. They shoot too much.
- How do I survive? With blocks.
- Creepers are only dangerous if you let them be.
- Just when I thought I was safe… a zombie.
- Ender Pearls: the ultimate teleportation tool.
- I like my mobs like I like my coffee: hostile.
- Did someone say "treasure"? I’ll be right there!
- Lava is the ultimate dance floor.
- Just one more block… promise!
- A creeper a day keeps the good vibes away.
- Mining: it’s a dirty job, but someone has to do it.
- Who needs a farm when you can steal from villagers?
- I’m out of torches… guess I’ll just live in the dark.
- I can’t find my house, but I’m sure it's somewhere.
- It’s not a cave, it’s a vacation spot!
- Why sleep when you can mine all night?
- Don’t tell me where to dig. I’ll find it.
- I’m going to mine so deep I reach the nether.
- I could use some diamonds... just saying.
- The creeper made me do it.
- My pickaxe is better than your sword.
- I’m lost in the wilderness, and I’m okay with it.
- Spiders only want one thing: to scare you.
- Don’t mind me, I’m just living my best block life.
- I should’ve known better than to dig down.
- I’m not afraid of the dark, I’m just unprepared.
- Never dig down. It’s only fun if you survive.
- Is this the end? I think it is… for now.
- If it's not TNT, it's not worth my time.
- I broke that block with style.
- Zombies don’t scare me… much.
- What happens in the cave, stays in the cave.
- Who needs to mine when you have TNT?
- Don't look up. The mobs are watching.
- I’m just here for the free iron.
- My bed is my safe place… unless it's day.
- Zombies: the real party animals.
- Can you smell what I’m cooking? It’s creeper stew!
- Diamonds? Pfft, I’ll find them later.
- A day in Minecraft is a day full of surprises.
- Who needs a shovel when you’ve got hands?
- I found a cave, and now I can’t find my way out.
- Creepers are just misunderstood explosives.
- Minecraft is my happy place… until night falls.
- The best kind of cave is the one with diamonds.
- I mine, therefore I am.
- One does not simply walk past lava.
- My sword’s sharper than my wit.
- Creeper? Never heard of her.
- I’ve got a shovel, and I’m ready to dig!
- Zombies: just misunderstood party guests.
- I’m not lost, I’m exploring the unknown.
- TNT is my secret weapon.
- When in doubt, break more blocks.
- If it ain’t broke, it’s probably a creeper.
- Lava, meet water. Water, meet lava.
- I’m just here to break stuff and have fun.
- Don’t look up… just don’t.
- Who needs friends when you have blocks?
- It’s not a mistake, it’s an adventure.
- I’m so good, even mobs respect me.
- Don’t mind me, just building a dirt mansion.
- Lava + water = infinite fun!
- I live for the block life.
- You can never have too many pickaxes.
- Spiders are the true MVPs of Minecraft.
- The floor is lava—again.
- Don’t worry, I’ll save the world... eventually.
- Diamonds? I prefer to find them by accident.
- Minecraft: Where falling in lava is a lifestyle.
- If you see a skeleton, it's too late.
- Digging deep, finding diamonds… maybe.
- Just another day of breaking everything.
- A creeper? I call that a good time.
- Mobs are just misunderstood block lovers.
